topic.title: Today's Guest Speaker: Adam Pender
topic.text:
Adam Pender is currently Mechanical Engineering Senior Manager at Lockheed Martin, where he's spent over 20 years in propulsion engineering for commercial, NASA, and military spacecraft. His career trajectory spans from Engineering Co-Op at GE Aviation to graduate intern at Boeing, eventually becoming a Senior Staff Propulsion Engineer and now senior manager at Lockheed Martin. Throughout his career, he's developed both deep technical expertise and the ability to communicate complex engineering concepts clearly.

As a Propulsion Subsystem Certified Principal Engineer, Adam bridges the gap between highly technical implementation and strategic communication. That's exactly the skill set you're building as you create your Madison AI tools.

Check out his LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/apender/ 

Please have your camera on and come prepared with questions for participation credit. Adam's expertise in being both technical AND creative makes him the perfect person to learn from as you prepare to showcase your own AI tools on Substack and position yourself for internships.

Think about:

  • Your specific career path questions, especially how to build technical credibility over time
  • How his translation expertise applies to YOUR Madison tool or brand
  • Anything you're wrestling with about being technical AND creative
